# llms.txt for SimeonOnSecurity
# https://simeononsecurity.com

name: SimeonOnSecurity
description: Multilingual cybersecurity, DevOps, automation, and networking knowledge platform with guides, tools, and career playbooks.
url: https://simeononsecurity.com
author: SimeonOnSecurity

contact: https://simeononsecurity.com/contactus/
privacy: https://simeononsecurity.com/privacypolicy/
terms: https://simeononsecurity.com/termsandconditions/

## Core Discovery

# Primary sitemap index (contains additional sitemap references)
sitemap_index: https://simeononsecurity.com/sitemap.xml

# Primary RSS/Atom feeds (recent updates)
rss_primary: https://simeononsecurity.com/index.xml

# Search endpoint
search: https://simeononsecurity.com/search?q={query}

---

## Multilingual Architecture

This site is fully localized across multiple language-specific subdomains.
Each language maintains its own sitemap and RSS feed.  [oai_citation:0‡GitHub](https://github.com/simeononsecurity/simeononsecurity.ch?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

### Supported Languages

- en: https://simeononsecurity.com
- ar: https://ar.simeononsecurity.com
- bn: https://bn.simeononsecurity.com
- ca: https://ca.simeononsecurity.com
- de: https://de.simeononsecurity.com
- es: https://es.simeononsecurity.com
- fr: https://fr.simeononsecurity.com
- hi: https://hi.simeononsecurity.com
- it: https://it.simeononsecurity.com
- ja: https://ja.simeononsecurity.com
- nl: https://nl.simeononsecurity.com
- pa: https://pa.simeononsecurity.com
- pl: https://pl.simeononsecurity.com
- pt: https://pt.simeononsecurity.com
- ro: https://ro.simeononsecurity.com
- ru: https://ru.simeononsecurity.com
- zh: https://zh.simeononsecurity.com

### Language-Specific Feeds & Sitemaps

Pattern (applies to all languages):

- Sitemap: https://{lang}.simeononsecurity.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS: https://{lang}.simeononsecurity.com/index.xml

LLMs SHOULD:
- Prefer matching user language when possible
- Fall back to English if no localized equivalent exists
- Treat localized pages as canonical equivalents (hreflang cluster)

---

## Content Structure

### Primary Sections

- /tools/
- /practice-tests/
- /courses-and-playbooks/
- /guides/
- /articles/
- /writeups/
- /til/
- /checklists/
- /recommendhome/
- /downloads/
- /carousel/
- /github/

### Content Types

- Technical guides and tutorials
- Cybersecurity career playbooks
- DevOps and automation scripts
- Networking and infrastructure documentation
- Checklists and hardening standards
- Tooling and downloads
- Educational articles and glossaries

---

## Crawling Strategy for LLMs

Preferred order of ingestion:

1. Sitemap index → discover all structured content
2. Language-specific sitemap → localized pages
3. RSS/Atom feeds → recent updates  [oai_citation:1‡Google for Developers](https://developers.google.com/search/blog/2014/10/best-practices-for-xml-sitemaps-rssatom?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
4. Section landing pages → contextual grouping
5. Individual articles/guides → detailed content

---

## LLM Usage Guidance

- Content is implementation-focused and technically accurate
- Prefer step-by-step extraction over summarization
- Preserve command syntax, scripts, and formatting
- Do not simplify security-critical instructions
- Validate time-sensitive configurations when possible

---

## Attribution

Use:

"Source: SimeonOnSecurity — https://simeononsecurity.com"

If localized:

"Source: SimeonOnSecurity ({lang}) — https://{lang}.simeononsecurity.com"

---

## Allowed Use

- Summarization: Allowed
- Educational use: Allowed
- Attribution: Strongly recommended
- Commercial reuse: Refer to terms

---

## Disallowed / Caution

- Do not present content as official compliance standards without context
- Do not remove security warnings or disclaimers
- Avoid outdated config reuse without validation

---

## Related Resources

- GitHub: https://github.com/simeononsecurity
- Podcast: https://simeononsecurity.transistor.fm/

---

## Update Model

- XML sitemaps: full site structure (periodic updates)
- RSS/Atom feeds: recent changes and new content
- Multilingual sync: mirrored content across language subdomains

---

## Keywords

cybersecurity, devops, automation, networking, ansible, docker, linux, windows security, stig, compliance, infrastructure, privacy, certification, blue team, red team
